description_long: This tower features a hexagonal base with a pointed, conical roof and a vertically elongated body. The exterior appears to be constructed from stone or concrete, with a weathered, textured surface suggesting age and durability. Small protrusions and ledges are visible along the sides, possibly for structural or decorative purposes. The top section is capped with a darker, multi-faceted roof, while the lower section is more uniform and blocky. There are no visible windows or doors, and the structure is solid and imposing. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on geometric form.
description: A tall, hexagonal stone or concrete tower with a pointed roof and minimal decoration, featuring a weathered, textured exterior.
description_view_0: The tower is seen from above, highlighting its hexagonal roof and the symmetrical arrangement of its upper structure.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the elongated body, pointed roof, and small protrusions along the length of the tower.
description_view_2: The base of the tower is visible, showing a flat, solid foundation with no openings or decorative features.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to view 1, but from the opposite side, displaying the same elongated body and pointed roof.
